{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207144590D739F6A073F866D4C5"}"},"total":4220},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7431293400791040792","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，把奥特曼跟诡异结合的很好。每一卷的悬念都设计的很吸引人，比如说伪型初代的真实身份，火星基地毁灭的真相……
作者一直在强调主角不是真奥，但主角和原版赛文一样热爱人类，甚至原版赛文的招式主角也会。真让人期待主角的真实身份。","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":5,"text":"奥特曼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774134885F866D4C5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227431293400791040792%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227406487119201324094%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%A5%E7%89%B9%E6%9B%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730247220,"group_id":"7406487119201324094","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"让你见识一下，至高神的力量","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8zbzZtpgJDZSbAa7VU318cVZHkoT68UJxN9ULe6OFWK","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/baa8036a10b942c49adeb3948366bd06~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703938&x-signature=LVp8PsCBqr8VfLm%2BtX8CzzY3Yao%3D","user_id":"3598023206901901","user_name":"黎斗卡密"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3598023206901901","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7406487119201324094","book_info":{"abstract":"【全员皆伪奥】＋【不是原宇宙】＋【恐怖】＋【在无尽绝望后一定是光带来希望】
……
一：【我】是赛文奥特曼，是奥特兄弟里的一员。
二：【我】不是恒星观测员340号，我是宇宙观测员340号，负责巡视各个存在着奥特曼的宇宙。
三：在【我】的认知里，目前光之国监测到的奥特宇宙截止【布莱泽奥特曼】，不存在亚刻奥特曼，请忘记【他】的存在。
四：在【我】的认知里，光之国的等离子火花塔是被禁制进入的，上一个进入里面的是贝利亚奥特曼，他已经消失在了宇宙的最深处，不要去试着寻找他，也不要进入等离子火花塔，除非【我】已经做好了一切准备。
五：【我】的徒弟是雷欧奥特曼，【我】的儿子赛罗奥特曼还未出生，请不要提及赛罗奥特曼的存在。
六：注意！所有被发现存有奥特曼的宇宙，奥特曼都不曾存在，他们只存在于人类或其他宇宙人的历史中。
……
作为宇宙观测员的赛文踏上了寻找真相的路。
但出现在他眼前是什么……？
与皮套同化的等人型初代奥特曼、被加坦杰厄残余力量侵蚀的满身黑洞的迪迦、卷土重来的斯菲亚变成的戴拿。
再往后，越来越多的恐怖与绝望蔓延上心头。
他恍然回首，看向了那永远赐予光之国白昼的火花塔。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0fa65a9dd2ace885e21ceaf59d84303e","author":"老逢魔","author_id":"","book_id":"7406487119201324094","book_name":"开具穿越虚假世界，赛文淦了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7406647494970442264","read_count":"61742","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1146155"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"503","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,奥特同人,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7b333e6cb947ef34448fc1dc46ae15d2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318885&x-signature=p9c4IXOEzXwCzudANeqhCynxiI4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101399621933","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207144590D739F6A073F866D4C5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":254,"forwarded_count"
